zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Devereux於1452年出生在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，她的父親Sir Walter Devereux IV20歲，母親Anne Ferrers15歲。她於1469年與Richard de Corbet在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Devereux于1452年出生在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特时，她的父亲Sir Walter Devereux IV20岁，母亲Anne Ferrers15岁。她于1469年与Richard de Corbet在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年在英国英格兰史洛普爾布福德享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Devereux was born in 1452, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Walter Devereux IV, was 20 and her mother, Anne Ferrers, was 15. She married Richard de Corbet in 1469, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1516, in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Devereux est née en 1452, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Devereux IV, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Ferrers, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Corbet en 1469, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Devereux 1452 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Devereux IV 20 und ihre Mutter Anne Ferrers 15. Sie hat 1469 in Herefordshire, England Richard de Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1516 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Devereux è nata il nel 1452 nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Devereux IV, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Anne Ferrers, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Corbet nel 1469, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1516, nel Burford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Burford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Devereuxが1452年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Devereux IVは20歳，母Anne Ferrersは15歳であった。1469年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでRichard de Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Devereux(이)가 1452년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Devereux IV(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Ferrers(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Richard de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard de Corbet em 1469, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Devereux родилась в 1452 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Devereux IV было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Ferrers, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Corbet в 1469 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Devereux nació en 1452, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Devereux IV, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anne Ferrers, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Richard de Corbet en 1469, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1516, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
